programme.title: Skin Tight
programme.desc: Brenda's excess skin forces an end to her marriage; Mellisa's 180-pound weight loss leaves her with loose skin that affects her relationship with her daughters.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Skin Tight
programme.desc: After her husband suddenly passes away, Jenae reaches 512 pounds, but her excess skin hides her weight loss; Julie's excess skin provides a constant reminder of her obesity and how it damaged her marriage.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: Lacey ballooned up over 600 lbs on pizza and ice cream and knows Dr. Now is her best hope for success; she must now rally her divorced parents around her for support and find a way to modulate her moods that won't include binge-eating.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: After gastric bypass surgery, Chad quickly sheds his dangerous weight but faces a medical crisis when he does not follow the doctor's orders.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: Brittani married a man who loves large women, but at 600-lbs, she can barely contribute to their marriage, and gets surgery to try to have a normal relationship.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: When Annjeanette was nine, a campaign was established to send her to fat camp; she hated that her weight had become a source of public shame and she has struggled to overcome her food addiction; now, she must change her habits to save her life.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: Lindsey has a white picket fence, a loving husband and a great job, but her food addiction threatens to ruin everything; as she embarks on a weight loss journey to save her life, her husband may provide more harm than support.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: Tommy wants to lose weight so he can marry his fiancée and have the life he always dreamed of with her, but to break the cycle of pathological eating that left him nearly bed-bound, he'll have to face a piece of his past he has always kept secret.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: Dominic's life is falling apart due to his food addiction; over 600 pounds and living in a van with his brother, he decides to leave California for Texas, where only Dr. Now can help him learn to face life's challenges without using food to cope.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: Having her daughters help bathe her is not how Chrystal pictured parenting but she is so large that there's no other option; Chrystal wants Dr. Now's help but she didn't know that bringing her childhood trauma to light would be part of the deal.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: Ryan moved to Montana to keep himself from going down a dark path of drug addiction but his new path may be no less lethal than the last if he can't find a way to curb his eating habits before they kill him.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: Paul weighs in at 700 pounds, and his girlfriend struggles with how this limits their ability to live a normal life; he thinks their relationship won't survive if he moves to work with Dr. Now, but prioritizing his own health is the only option.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Angelina has a huge chest lump under her left breast; Delano has a football-sized mass on his back.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Melissa tries to cover a huge lipoma with a sweatshirt for years; Tyler's fear of cancer keep him from having his huge head lumps diagnosed; Tahj is covered in painful boils; Amber has ear keloids that take control of her life.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Ronen's mysterious lump above his knee is one of the largest Dr. Lee has ever seen; Amber suffers from a debilitating skin disease that no one understands; Sandy has a neck lump she calls Tommy; Kristy's eyelid cyst is ruining her life.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Half of Mary's body is a size 18 while the other half is a size 8; Anthony's cyst is in the area called the "Triangle of Death;" Shane wants to get a lump off his back; Brandi is anxious about getting a lump removed from her chest.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Belinda's lump on her neck causes her to basically be immobile; Nicole won't get married until she gets her armpit lump removed; Adela's chest and back are covered in wisdom spots; Nick foolishly removes a lipoma at home and now needs Dr. Lee.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.sub-title: The Curious Case of the Pooting Cyst
programme.desc: Diane has tumors all over her body that have ruined her life; Will fears his shoulder lump will be ripped open at work; Anthony's daughters force him to get his lump examined; a woman detests her hideous varicose veins.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Taylor has a large bump at the base of her spine that is far more dangerous than she realizes; John jokes about his hip lump, but it's no laughing matter; Noelle had her ears stretched as a teen, but now wants them repaired.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Louis is a veteran who is covered in scaly, dry skin that makes him feel like an alligator; Irais's kids are bullied because of the embarrassing growth on her head; Johnny has been living with a stubborn lump on his back for too long.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Patrick's nose is covered by huge bumps, and he can barely breathe; Aziza and Lauren are friends who bonded over their matching wrist lumps; Joe has a mound in the middle of his forehead that looks like a third eye.

Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: April is covered in bumps that disfigure her arms; Genner flies all the way from the Philippines to have Dr. Lee help with his bumpy nose; Chris suffers from psoriasis that nearly covers his body and a bump on his head.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Matt has a skin condition that causes tumors to grow all over his body; Yamileth hasn't pursued her dreams because of the lump on her neck; Pat is covered with dark spots from her neck to her abdomen; Jennifer has a unicorn bump on her forehead.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Amber has hundreds of tumors on her face; Antonio has a mound on his spine and is afraid it might be impossible to remove; sisters Cheri and Janice both suffer from possibly matching lumps; Tatiana has an embarrassing bump on her butt cheek.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Lisa has a horn growing out of the back of her head and fears that it could be cancer; Victor has a bulbous lump on his chest; Chuck has a Popeye-shaped bump on his arm; Christian and Jonathan are teenage brothers with matching lumps.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Taylor is a beautiful young woman who has unsightly elf-like bumps on her ears; Jose never goes out because of the baseball-sized lump on his head; Ken is covered in painful bumps that make it difficult to do everyday things.

Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Nhan has an extreme, red birthmark that covers half his face; Debbie worries that her shoulder lump will prematurely age her; Justin is a dude rockin' a man bun, but he's having no fun due to the bumps poking through his scalp.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Jess is a widower looking for love who is stuck with a giant bump on his neck; Cherish developed a leopard-print face during pregnancy; former NFL defensive tackle Marcell Dareus hopes Dr. Lee can tackle his forehead lipoma.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
